entries.value: You obtained the bow. You can now hit targets from a distance, like monsters or mechanisms.|You need arrows to use the bow.
You obtained the pickaxe. You can now break stones and mine metals to upgrade your weapons and armor.
You obtained the dark medal.|You can now create a weak double of yourself that avoids traps and can walk through special areas.
You obtained the shield. You can now block certain attacks and projectiles.
You obtained the lamp. You can now light up dark rooms or set certain objects and enemies on fire.
You obtained the hammer. You can now deal area damage and activate certain mechanisms.
